mentions.note: Preferred animal health pick over Zoetis; Cramer favors Jeff Simmons' leadership and growth trajectory.

Turnaround story: up 137% past 12-months, 17% YTD. Six blockbusters: Cordelia Quattro (parasiticides, 30% growth, market leader), Zenrelli (dermatology, 40% Brazil share), pain, farm brands. Driven by pet humanization (70% puppies outside US, 40% subscription), protein revolution, farm efficiency. Management target 2028: mid-single-digit revenue, high single-digit EBITDA, low double-digit EPS growth.
